name: BaseRebarGroup.RebarGroupSpacingTypeEnum
summary: The ways to distribute the reinforcing bars with different spacings.

enum_values.name: SPACING_TYPE_EXACT_SPACINGS
enum_values.summary: The bars are distributed using the spacing values.

enum_values.name: SPACING_TYPE_EXACT_NUMBER
enum_values.summary: Equal distribution by the number of reinforcing bars.

enum_values.name: SPACING_TYPE_TARGET_SPACE
enum_values.summary: Equal distribution by the target spacing value.

enum_values.name: SPACING_TYPE_EXACT_SPACE_FLEX_AT_START
enum_values.summary: Distribution by the exact spacing value with a flexible first space.

enum_values.name: SPACING_TYPE_EXACT_SPACE_FLEX_AT_END
enum_values.summary: Distribution by the exact spacing value with a flexible last space.

enum_values.name: SPACING_TYPE_EXACT_SPACE_FLEX_AT_BOTH
enum_values.summary: Distribution by the exact spacing value with flexible first and last spaces.

enum_values.name: SPACING_TYPE_EXACT_SPACE_FLEX_AT_MIDDLE
enum_values.summary: Distribution by the exact spacing value with a flexible middle space.
